node.statement: (Contradiction with extremality) WLOG t^+ < ∞. If V^+ is closed, then x* = x + t^+·D ∈ V^+ ∩ C lies on a proper face F' ⊊ F. Also x** = x - ε·D ∈ C for small ε > 0. Then x = (ε/(t^+ + ε))·x* + (t^+/(t^+ + ε))·x**, a non-trivial convex combination of two distinct elements of C. This contradicts x being an extreme point of C. Therefore ker φ_F = {0} and d_F ≤ m.
